_changelog: 2026-04-20 Phase A1: L3 CubiCasa5k CNN now runs on every page including text PDFs. Against the Fire RFIs text-only PDF it misidentifies table-row separators as walls (~14 on page 0). This is expected behavior — L3 is tuned for floor plans, not text documents. wall_count_lte raised from 5 → 50 and warnings_empty → false to reflect the new l3_cubicasa_wall_count warning. Real floor-plan pages (e.g. 1881 arch page 1) produce 195 semantically-correct walls vs L1's 141k false-positives.
